case_title: SU MING GUAN VS. JOSE HUMBERTO CONTRERAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SU MING GUAN & DEFENDANT JOSE HUMBERTO CONTRERAS. YAXUAN GUAN WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. GUAN. DIANA CONTRERAS WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. CONTRERAS. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUAN, SU MING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JOSE HUMBERTO $943.59 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,018.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED JUL-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JOSE HUMBERTO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $943.59 FILED BY GUAN, SU MING AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, JOSE HUMBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF CHANGING ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT FROM: 225 KING STREET #506 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107 TO: 150 BERRY STREET #419 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUAN, SU MING
